prompt: I just cloned this react/typescript project from my team and I need to set up Claude Code for it. It's got a vite config, eslint, prettier, jest for testing, and we deploy to Vercel. The repo has like 200 files and a pretty standard src/components structure. Can you get everything configured so Claude works well with this codebase?

assertions.text: CLAUDE.md references vite, jest, and vercel specifically (not generic React boilerplate)
settings.json permissions include npm/npx/node but NOT Bash(*)
Output includes or recommends auto-format hooks (prettier/eslint)
Creates or recommends a memory directory structure
